content.text:
Based on the detailed view of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 13 (O):

From the image, atom O:13 (red sphere) is directly connected to:
- N:11 (blue sphere) - nitrogen
- O:12 (red sphere) - oxygen

The bonding appears to be:
- O:13 is covalently bonded to N:11 (nitrogen, atomic index 11)
- O:13 is covalently bonded to O:12 (oxygen, atomic index 12)

Looking at the file information in the grounding, I can see the file is named "geomconf_5493.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 5493.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 13 (O) are:
- Atomic index 11, element N (nitrogen)
- Atomic index 12, element O (oxygen)

Geomconf_index: 5493

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 13, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
